# Workspace Agent Defaults

For all coding in this repository, prioritize these local skill packs:

- `.github/skills/agent-skills-for-context-engineering/SKILL.md`
- `.github/skills/ui-ux-pro-max/SKILL.md`

Required behavior in this repo:

1. Use context-engineering skills for planning, decomposition, context management, and multi-step execution quality.
2. Use UI/UX Pro Max skill for any frontend/UI/HTML/CSS work, including layout, styling, typography, responsiveness, and accessibility.
3. When both apply, use context-engineering for execution strategy and UI/UX Pro Max for design decisions.
4. Favor existing project conventions and avoid unnecessary churn.
